name: HumiSense Voice API
description: A powerful voice recognition and synthesis API that enables seamless speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice command capabilities for your applications.
benefits: Improve user engagement with voice interfaces

use_cases.title: Customer Service
use_cases.description: AI-powered voice assistants for 24/7 customer support

use_cases.title: Healthcare
use_cases.description: Voice-enabled clinical documentation and patient monitoring

use_cases.title: Accessibility
use_cases.description: Voice control for applications serving users with disabilities

use_cases.title: Smart Home
use_cases.description: Voice-controlled IoT devices and home automation

api_example.code:
import requests

response = requests.post(
    'https://api.humisense.com/v1/voice/transcribe',
    headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'},
    files={'audio': open('recording.wav', 'rb')}
)
print(response.json())

name: Sentinel Chat
description: A secure, customizable conversational AI platform for building intelligent chatbots and virtual assistants that understand context and intent.

use_cases.title: Sales
use_cases.description: AI sales assistant for lead qualification and product recommendations

use_cases.title: Support
use_cases.description: Automated customer support with instant resolutions

use_cases.title: HR
use_cases.description: Employee self-service chatbot for policy questions

use_cases.title: Education
use_cases.description: Interactive learning assistants for students

api_example.code:
import humisense

client = humisense.Client(api_key='YOUR_API_KEY')
response = client.chat.send(
    message='I need help with my order',
    context={'user_id': 'user_123', 'order_id': 'ORD-456'}
)
print(response.reply)

name: HumiSense Agent Studio
description: A comprehensive platform for designing, training, and deploying autonomous AI agents that can reason, plan, and execute complex tasks.

use_cases.title: Research
use_cases.description: Autonomous agents for literature review and data analysis

use_cases.title: Operations
use_cases.description: Automated workflow orchestration across systems

use_cases.title: Content
use_cases.description: AI agents for content creation and curation

use_cases.title: Finance
use_cases.description: Automated financial analysis and reporting agents

api_example.code:
import humisense

client = humisense.Client(api_key='YOUR_API_KEY')
agent = client.agents.create(
    name='Research Assistant',
    capabilities=['web_search', 'data_analysis', 'report_generation'],
    memory_type='vector_store'
)
agent.deploy()

name: HumiSense Analytics AI
description: An AI-powered analytics platform that transforms raw data into actionable insights using advanced machine learning and natural language queries.
benefits: Get insights in seconds, not days
Reduce time from data to insight by 80%

use_cases.title: Business Intelligence
use_cases.description: AI-powered dashboards with automatic insights

use_cases.title: Marketing
use_cases.description: Customer behavior analysis and campaign optimization

use_cases.title: Operations
use_cases.description: Supply chain optimization and efficiency analysis

use_cases.title: Finance
use_cases.description: Financial forecasting and risk assessment

api_example.code:
import humisense

client = humisense.Client(api_key='YOUR_API_KEY')
insights = client.analytics.query(
    question='What were our top performing products last quarter?',
    data_sources=['sales_db', 'inventory_db']
)
for insight in insights:
    print(insight.summary)

name: HumiSense Research Assistant
description: An AI-powered research tool that helps scientists and researchers discover insights, analyze papers, and accelerate the research process.
features: Semantic paper search across millions of sources

use_cases.title: Academic Research
use_cases.description: Comprehensive literature reviews and hypothesis generation

use_cases.title: Pharmaceutical
use_cases.description: Drug discovery and clinical trial analysis

use_cases.title: Technical Research
use_cases.description: Engineering and computer science research acceleration

use_cases.title: Market Research
use_cases.description: Competitive analysis and market opportunity identification

api_example.code:
import humisense

client = humisense.Client(api_key='YOUR_API_KEY')
review = client.research.literature_review(
    topic='transformer architectures for NLP',
    max_papers=50,
    include_citations=True
)
print(review.markdown)
